title: Fluffy Chinese Tiger Prawns Stir-fry
description: This earthy and adventurous Chinese dish combines the boldness of tiger prawns with Mediterranean flavors, resulting in a fluffy stir-fry that is sure to be both adventurous and comforting.

ingredients.name: 1 cup broccoli florets
ingredients.notes: Freshly steamed for a crunchier texture

ingredients.name: 200g tiger prawns
ingredients.notes: Frozen tiger prawns, defrosted and peeled

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: To enhance the flavor and add a touch of brightness

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: Or any preferred neutral-flavored oil for stir-frying

instructions: In a large wok or skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the tiger prawns and cook until they turn pink, about 2-3 minutes per side. Remove from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add sliced red bell pepper and yellow onion. Sauté for about 5 minutes or until softened.
Add minced garlic, ground cumin, and a squeeze of lemon juice. Stir well to combine spices with vegetables.
Return prawns to the pan along with any accumulated juices from the wok. Mix all ingredients together thoroughly.
Once everything is well combined, serve hot with freshly steamed broccoli florets as a side dish for added texture and color.
